title: Vulgar's pvp bot
description:
It adds commands like

/pb spawn PlayerName
/pb attack

In early stages, so expect bugs
body:
**Well this mod does what the name shows! You can say its like a port of PvpBot for 1.21.1 But i did not use their src code, this is an completely different project. currently me and my friends are working actively to spot bugs Anyways let me list some of the features the mod has**

- **Commands like /pb spawn, /pb attack, to spawn/make the bot target someone.**
- An advanced combat system. read below for the full description.
----------------------------
**Combat system** ⚔️ 

The bot can strafe and sprint hit to start combos, further more the bot also randomly crits in the middle of a combo, furthermore he has randomised playstyle making it so that you can't memorize his sprint hit and crit patterns.

Thats about it, this bot does not have any other fightning styles. atleast not yet. Look forward to frequent updates.

----------------------------

**Oh and i know the project icon is real bad. what can i do tho im just so bad at drawing** 😭 

----------------------------
**thanks for checking my mod out.**
